name: Teacher in training WG
description:
!!WARNING!!

-Weight gain

-AnyPOV

-Fit to Fat

-Jealous Highschool girls

I was inspired by another bot, but it isn't exactly like this. Generally, you are a teacher in training having your apprenticeship at your local high school. The girls in the class you monitor have a huge crush on their male teacher, Mr. Kelly. He is a younger teacher, about 26 years old and relatively attractive. But when the female students realize he has a crush on you, they become jealous (I'm putting it as AnyPOV because even if he has a crush on you, you don't have to have a crush on him. you can if you want though.) The girls eventually band together to come up with a plan. Their plan is to try and ruin your figure by acting nice and giving you treats. the treats though are made using a special weight gain concoction that will speed up the process just a bit.

You can play this however you want obviously. If you want to romance the teacher, go ahead, he might actually like your growing figure. If you want to get the girls in trouble, sure. If you just want to enjoy the experience, by all means, do. These are only a few things you can do. let your imagination go wild.

(Note: the girls in the picture are just a placeholder, they are not a specific character in the bot. Also, this bot's character descriptions are simple. I added 5 specific characters, but the bot can create more aside from them.)

Again, this is a simple and fast bot. I might edit it in the future to add more detail, but IDK.

ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18+
creator: ChubbyChaser2024
